props.ChoiceText: One kill was worth far more than meat, and for once the wild paid in coin.
props.ChoiceBio: A rare pelt reminded you that the wild sometimes pays in coin instead of scars.

0.TransitionText: Because a rare pelt reminded you that the wild sometimes pays in coin instead of scars, you kept to the wild and made solitude, sign, and patience your trade.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Hunter, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a rare pelt reminded you that the wild sometimes pays in coin instead of scars, hides, routes, and scarce goods taught you to live by bargain as much as by the bow.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a rare pelt reminded you that the wild sometimes pays in coin instead of scars, you kept to the wild and made solitude, sign, and patience your trade.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Hunter, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TargetText: A buyer or trader remembers you as the hunter who brought in the rare skin.
